## LibraryRuntime.IRuntimeMold.totalCapacity property

Gets the total capacity of the mold (all cavities) in grams. Returns undefined if cavityWeight is not defined.

**Signature:**

```typescript
readonly totalCapacity: Measurement | undefined;
```
